channel.title: Mikhail Stock Library
channel.description: Commercial images for technology, business, industry, healthcare and modern visual communication.

item.title: Fishmonger using digital dashboard to monitor seafood inventory and sales
item.description: Fishmonger using digital dashboard to monitor seafood inventory and sales. Subjects: fishmonger, seafood, market, business, dashboard, datum, inventory, sale, management, technology, digital, screen. License this image on Adobe Stock.
